meta.description: Metadata about when and how the graph was generated.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime string recording when /infra-init produced this graph.

commit.description: Short git commit hash at the time of generation. Null when the repo has no commits.

root.description: Absolute path to the repository root on the machine that ran /infra-init.

nodes.description: All symbols and structural elements extracted from the codebase.

id.description: Stable, unique node identifier scoped to the repo root. Convention: 'relative/path.py::ClassName::method_name' for code symbols, 'env::VAR_NAME' for environment variables.

name.description: Human-readable symbol name (class name, function name, variable name, route path, etc.).

file.description: Relative path from the repo root to the file in which this node is defined.

line_start.description: Line number (1-based) where this symbol is defined in its file.

exported.description: True when the symbol is exported / public. Omit or false for module-private symbols.

is_entry_point.description: True when this node is a top-level entry point — a Lambda handler, HTTP route handler, queue consumer, scheduled job, etc.

trigger.description: Human-readable trigger description for entry points (e.g. 'sqs:SendNotificationQueue', 'http:GET /users', 'eventbridge:myapp.order.placed'). Null or absent for non-entry-point nodes.

edges.description: Directed relationships between nodes capturing calls, imports, env var reads, and containment.

type.description: Relationship type. 'calls': a function/method invokes another. 'imports': a file imports a symbol or module. 'reads_env': a symbol reads an environment variable. 'contains': a file or class contains a child node. 'defines': an infrastructure file defines a resource. 'exports': a module re-exports a symbol.

from.description: Node ID of the source — the symbol that initiates the relationship.

to.description: Node ID of the target — the symbol being called, imported, read, or contained.

file.description: Relative file path where this relationship is expressed (i.e. the file containing the call or import statement).

line.description: Line number (1-based) within 'file' where this relationship occurs.

symbols.description: Pre-built name-keyed index for fast symbol lookup. Keys are symbol names; values are the corresponding node object(s). The MCP server's codebase_search_symbol tool queries this index.

callers.description: Pre-built index mapping a symbol ID to the list of callers that invoke it. Keys are node IDs; values are lists of caller descriptors. The MCP server's codebase_find_callers tool queries this index.

env_vars.description: Pre-built index of environment variables defined in the repo. Keys are variable names (canonical casing); values include definition location, default value, and which symbols read them. The MCP server's codebase_get_env_var tool queries this index.

endpoints.description: Pre-built index of exposed HTTP routes and external API client endpoints. Populated by the Graph Builder from route-type nodes and infrastructure config. The MCP server's codebase_search_api_endpoints tool queries this index.
